mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_evaluation_results WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT ser.id, ep.period_name AS periodName, ep.academic_year AS academicYear, ep.semester_type AS semesterType, ser.total_score AS totalScore, ser.class_rank AS classRank, ser.class_total AS classTotal, ser.moral_weighted_score AS moralWeightedScore, ser.intellectual_weighted_score AS intellectualWeightedScore, ser.physical_weighted_score AS physicalWeightedScore, ser.aesthetic_weighted_score AS aestheticWeightedScore, ser.labor_weighted_score AS laborWeightedScore, ser.development_weighted_score AS developmentWeightedScore, ser.status, ser.calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM student_evaluation_results ser JOIN evaluation_periods ep ON ser.evaluation_period_id = ep.id WHERE ser.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY ep.academic_year DESC, ep.semester_type DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE student_evaluation_results ser JOIN ( SELECT id, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY total_score DESC) as rank_num, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id) as total_num FROM student_evaluation_results WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND class_id = #{classId} ) ranked ON ser.id = ranked.id SET ser.class_rank = ranked.rank_num, ser.class_total = ranked.total_num WHERE ser.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND ser.class_id = #{classId}

UPDATE student_evaluation_results ser JOIN ( SELECT id, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY grade_id ORDER BY total_score DESC) as rank_num, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY grade_id) as total_num FROM student_evaluation_results WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND grade_id = #{gradeId} ) ranked ON ser.id = ranked.id SET ser.grade_rank = ranked.rank_num, ser.grade_total = ranked.total_num WHERE ser.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND ser.grade_id = #{gradeId}

UPDATE student_evaluation_results ser JOIN ( SELECT id, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY total_score DESC) as rank_num, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id) as total_num FROM student_evaluation_results WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND department_id = #{departmentId} ) ranked ON ser.id = ranked.id SET ser.department_rank = ranked.rank_num, ser.department_total = ranked.total_num WHERE ser.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND ser.department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT ser.*, ep.period_name AS periodName, ep.academic_year AS academicYear, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_evaluation_details sed WHERE sed.result_id = ser.id) AS detailCount FROM student_evaluation_results ser JOIN evaluation_periods ep ON ser.evaluation_period_id = ep.id WHERE ser.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE student_evaluation_results SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, AVG(total_score) AS avgScore, MAX(total_score) AS maxScore, MIN(total_score) AS minScore, AVG(moral_weighted_score) AS avgMoralScore, AVG(intellectual_weighted_score) AS avgIntellectualScore, AVG(physical_weighted_score) AS avgPhysicalScore, AVG(aesthetic_weighted_score) AS avgAestheticScore, AVG(labor_weighted_score) AS avgLaborScore, AVG(development_weighted_score) AS avgDevelopmentScore FROM student_evaluation_results WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND class_id = #{classId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, AVG(total_score) AS avgScore, MAX(total_score) AS maxScore, MIN(total_score) AS minScore FROM student_evaluation_results WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND grade_id = #{gradeId}

SELECT ser.id, ser.student_no as studentNo, ser.student_name as studentName, ser.moral_total_score as moralScore, ser.intellectual_total_score as intellectualScore, ser.physical_total_score as physicalScore, ser.aesthetic_total_score as aestheticScore, ser.labor_total_score as laborScore, ser.development_total_score as developmentScore, ser.total_score as totalScore, ser.class_rank as classRank FROM student_evaluation_results ser WHERE ser.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND ser.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY ser.class_rank

SELECT ser.id, ser.student_no as studentNo, ser.student_name as studentName, ser.class_name as className, ser.moral_total_score as moralScore, ser.intellectual_total_score as intellectualScore, ser.physical_total_score as physicalScore, ser.aesthetic_total_score as aestheticScore, ser.labor_total_score as laborScore, ser.development_total_score as developmentScore, ser.total_score as totalScore, ser.grade_rank as gradeRank FROM student_evaluation_results ser WHERE ser.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND ser.grade_id = #{gradeId} ORDER BY ser.grade_rank
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, ROUND(AVG(moral_total_score), 2) as avgMoral, ROUND(AVG(intellectual_total_score), 2) as avgIntellectual, ROUND(AVG(physical_total_score), 2) as avgPhysical, ROUND(AVG(aesthetic_total_score), 2) as avgAesthetic, ROUND(AVG(labor_total_score), 2) as avgLabor, ROUND(AVG(development_total_score), 2) as avgDevelopment, ROUND(AVG(total_score), 2) as avgTotal, MAX(total_score) as maxTotal, MIN(total_score) as minTotal, SUM(CASE WHEN status >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as calculatedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as reviewedCount FROM student_evaluation_results WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{periodId}
